message:
chore: misc fixes across bulkhead, grpc, spawn_blocking, middleware, and load_balance

bulkhead: Call process_queue() after cancelling a pending entry so the
next queued item can be admitted immediately instead of waiting for the
next external trigger.

grpc/web: Simplify CR/LF sanitization to use a single replace() call
with a char array pattern instead of chained replace() calls.

spawn_blocking: Refactor panic payload extraction in oneshot drop test
to use map/or_else chain instead of if-else, improving readability.

middleware: Harden ExactBearer token matching to evaluate every token
in the list using fold instead of any(), preventing timing side-channel
leaks about which token matched or the list length.

load_balance: Scope the backends mutex lock in push() to drop before
calling on_backend_inserted(), preventing the strategy hook from
deadlocking if it needs to inspect the backend list.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
